title: The Woodpecker.
content:
I once a King and chief
    Now am the tree-bark's thief,
    Ever 'twixt trunk and leaf
    Chasing the prey.
meaning:
William Morris's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Woodpecker."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
